query:
SELECT dp.date,
       b.sortOrder,
       b.title,
       b.blockType,
       b.durationMin,
       s.name AS subject,
       LEFT(b.description, 80) AS description_preview
FROM dailyPlans dp
JOIN scheduleBlocks b ON b.planId = dp.id
LEFT JOIN subjects s ON s.id = b.subjectId
WHERE dp.date IN ('2026-05-18', '2026-05-21', '2026-05-22')
ORDER BY dp.date, b.sortOrder;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ZHgHA7566FjgCYD.51c539e8d5ba --database mm3swGictQLHDWKPJCGiHp --execute 
SELECT dp.date,
       b.sortOrder,
       b.title,
       b.blockType,
       b.durationMin,
       s.name AS subject,
       LEFT(b.description, 80) AS description_preview
FROM dailyPlans dp
JOIN scheduleBlocks b ON b.planId = dp.id
LEFT JOIN subjects s ON s.id = b.subjectId
WHERE dp.date IN ('2026-05-18', '2026-05-21', '2026-05-22')
ORDER BY dp.date, b.sortOrder;
